subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A non-drinking water service must be in accordance with AS/NZS 3500.1, subject to the following:

ol.li: Substitute clause 9.7.1(a) as follows: 9.7.1(a) be of a type that has a removable handle.
Substitute the text of clause 9.7.1(c) as follows: 9.7.1(c) have a non-standard inlet connecting thread and a standard hose connection outlet.

callout.p: Requirements for a non-drinking water service used for fire-fighting purposes are contained in Part B4.
